test of balance - balance while s+G212itting in last 7 days. 0 = Maintained the position as required in test, 1 = Unsteady, but able to rebalance self without physical support, 2 = Partial physical support during test; or stands (sits) but does not follow directions for test, 3 = Not able to attempt test without physical help
230 G4AA G4AA_NECK_RANGE (G4AA) Neck Range of Motion CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: functional limitation in range of motion in last 7 days - neck -
